pipelines.description: and(variables('a'), variables('b')) — dual boolean variable gate for continuation logic.
and(not(empty(intersection(param, createArray(...)))), equals(param, value)) — module filtering with intersection.
and(and(equals(lookup_output, val), not(or(equals, equals))), equals(param, val)) — triple-nested boolean validation.
or(equals(param, 'val1'), equals(param, 'val2')) — load type routing with fail on invalid.
or(variables('done'), equals(length(variables('attempts')), param)) — Until loop exit with retry tracking.
contains(param, 'customers') — filter variant for customer data processing.
contains(param, 'orders') — filter variant for order records processing.
contains(param, 'products') — filter variant for product catalog processing.
contains(param, 'inventory') — filter variant for stock levels processing.
contains(param, 'shipments') — filter variant for logistics data processing.
contains(param, 'payments') — filter variant for payment records processing.
contains(param, 'audit_log') — filter variant for audit entries processing.
contains(param, 'analytics') — filter variant for analytics tables processing.

message.value: @concat('Current time ', variables('current_hour'), ' is before allowed window ', pipeline().parameters.earliest_start)

pipelines.description: greaterOrEquals(variables('hour'), param) — time window guard with convertFromUtc.

message.value: @concat('Current time ', variables('current_hour'), ' is before allowed window ', pipeline().parameters.earliest_start)

pipelines.description: 5+ boolean operators: and, or, not, empty, intersection, equals, bool combined in 3 cascading gates.
Chained if(equals(...), ..., if(equals(...), ...)) — cascading dispatch without Switch activity.
not(or(equals(...), equals(...))) — negated compound condition for excluding dev types.
Nested if(equals(...), val, if(equals(...), val, ...)) — 4-level dispatch without Switch.
or(equals(coalesce(param, ''), ''), equals(param, 'null')) — null/empty guard with coalesce.
and(not(empty(...)), greaterOrEquals(length(...), param)) — non-empty + minimum length gate.
